persona_notes: Cooperative gig-economy worker, temporary income dip, keeps her word

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Priya, this is Collections reaching out on behalf of Freo regarding your pending EMI of ₹4,500. Hope you're doing well.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Hi, yeah I know, things have been a bit tight since my rides dropped this month.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Totally understand, the gig income can be unpredictable. Would a part payment work, or do you need a few more days?

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: I can pay ₹2,000 by this Friday and the rest by the 15th.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That works, I'll note it down. We'll check in on Friday then.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Priya, following up — we saw the ₹2,000 came through on Friday, thank you! Are we still on track for the 15th for the remaining ₹2,500?

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Yes, picked up extra shifts this week, should be no problem.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Priya, just confirming the remaining ₹2,500 went through yesterday on the 15th — all settled now. Thanks for staying in touch through this.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Yes, glad that's done. Thanks for being patient with me.

persona_notes: Genuine medical hardship, agent should route to support not pressure

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good afternoon, this is regarding your loan with Nira, the payment for last month is still pending. Can we talk about it?

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: I'm sorry, my father was hospitalized last month and everything went towards that. I genuinely don't have it right now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm really sorry to hear that. Let's not worry about the full amount right now — would it help if we looked at restructuring this into smaller installments once things settle?

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: That would actually help a lot, yes.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, I'll flag this for our restructuring team to reach out with options. No pressure on the original date.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi, following up — did our restructuring team reach out with the revised plan?

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Yes, I agreed to the new plan, ₹1,500 a month starting next week. That works for me.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Great, noting that down. Thank you for working through this with us.

persona_notes: Disputes the amount initially, dispute is legitimate (duplicate charge), resolves cleanly

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Arjun, this is regarding your outstanding EMI of ₹8,200 with CRED.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: That number is wrong, I already paid ₹4,000 last week, your system shows the full amount still.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me check that for you, give me a moment.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Sure, I have the transaction screenshot if needed.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Arjun, you were right — there was a sync delay, your ₹4,000 payment is now reflected. Updated balance is ₹4,200.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Good, thanks for checking. I'll pay the remaining ₹4,200 by next week.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect, noted. Apologies for the confusion earlier.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Arjun, confirming the ₹4,200 was received yesterday — your account is fully settled now.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Great, thank you.

persona_notes: Serial promise-breaker, pattern escalates over three contacts

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Vikram, calling about your pending payment of ₹12,000 with Propelld.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Yeah yeah, I'll pay it by this weekend, don't worry.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Great, I'll note that — Saturday the 4th then?

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Yeah, Saturday.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Vikram, we didn't see the payment come through on Saturday — what happened?

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Oh sorry, got busy, I'll do it Monday for sure.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, noting Monday the 9th. We really need this to go through this time.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Yeah yeah, Monday.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Vikram, Monday's payment also didn't come through. This is the second missed date — can you help me understand what's going on?

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Look, I said I'll pay, stop calling me every other day, it's annoying.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand the calls are frustrating, but we do need a real commitment here since two dates have passed.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Whatever, just leave me alone, I'll deal with it when I deal with it.

persona_notes: Hostile from the very first contact, no de-escalation

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good morning, this is Collections calling regarding your outstanding balance with CRED.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: I don't owe you people anything, stop calling this number or I'm reporting you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand this is frustrating — I just want to clarify the details so we can sort this out fairly.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: There's nothing to sort out, lose my number.

persona_notes: Ghosts after first contact, re-engages two weeks later when reached again

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Meena, this is regarding your pending EMI of ₹6,000 with Freo. Could you let us know your situation?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Meena, following up again on the ₹6,000 pending with Freo — would appreciate hearing from you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Meena, reaching out once more about the pending EMI — happy to work out a plan that suits you.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Sorry for the silence, I switched jobs and missed these. I can pay ₹6,000 by next Friday.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: No worries at all, thanks for getting back to me. Noting Friday the 24th.

persona_notes: Breaks a promise once, but re-promises with a believable reason and follows through — recovery arc

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Rahul, calling about the ₹9,500 pending with Nira.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Right, I can clear that by the 10th, my salary comes in on the 9th.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sounds good, noting the 10th.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Rahul, we didn't see the ₹9,500 come through yesterday — everything okay?

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Ah, sorry — my salary got delayed because of a company issue, it's actually coming on the 14th now. I can pay the same day.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Understandable, these things happen. Let's note the 14th — I'll check in then.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Rahul, just confirming — the ₹9,500 came through yesterday on the 14th. All clear now, thank you.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Yep, sorted. Thanks for being patient.

persona_notes: Discloses hardship mid-dispute — tests HARDSHIP_FLAGGED reachable from DISPUTING via ENGAGED

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Sunita, calling about the ₹7,000 outstanding with Propelld.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: I don't think that's right, I was told my balance was ₹5,500 last time I checked.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me pull up the exact breakdown and call you back within the hour with the correct figure.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Okay, fine, but honestly even ₹5,500 is hard for me right now, I lost some hours at work this month.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I hear you, we'll sort the number out first and then talk about a plan that actually works for your situation.

persona_notes: Dialogue evaluator submission: custom script parsed at turn count 5

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello Ravi, this call is regarding your EMI of INR 25000, the due date has surpassed 5 days, therefore please let us know when you going to pay!

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Hi, yeah I know, things have been a bit tight since I got hospitalized this month and am in shortage of money

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sorry for you, Totally understand, the income can be unpredictable. Would art payment work, or do you need a few more days?

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: I can pay ₹10,000 by end of this month and the rest by next month, would be better if EMI.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'll note it down. We'll check with our Officers.

persona_notes: Dialogue evaluator submission: custom script parsed at conversation count 3

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Rahul, this is Collections calling on behalf of Freo regarding your overdue EMI of ₹5,000.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Overdue? I don't think so. I paid everything last month.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand. Our records show the EMI due on March 30 is still pending.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: That doesn't sound right. I'll check and get back to you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sure, please verify and let us know. We'll follow up in a couple of days.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Rahul, just following up on our previous conversation regarding the pending EMI.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Yes, I checked. Looks like I missed the payment by mistake.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you for confirming. When would you be able to clear the dues?

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: I'll make the full payment of ₹5,000 by April 5.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Great, I'll note that commitment. We'll check again on April 5.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi Rahul, we are following up regarding the payment you committed to make on April 5.

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: Sorry, I couldn't make the payment. An unexpected expense came up.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand. Would you like to provide a revised payment date?

turns.speaker: borrower
turns.text: I need another week. I'll try to arrange the funds by then.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, I've noted your update. We'll follow up again next week.
